patch.value: Validation found changelog:full writes a full all-release-tags changelog, but changelog:check validated only the since-previous-tag prepend window. This made the generated full changelog fail its own release gate. Update changelog:check to use the same full replace/all-release-tags contract.
Align pm-brief changelog check with full changelog output
Changed changelog:check from the prepend-window helper to the full replace/all-release-tags pm-changelog invocation.
Running npm run changelog:full followed by npm run changelog:check passes.
Script updated; validation rerun follows in release checks.
changelog:check now validates the same full all-release-tags changelog that changelog:full writes.
